---
title: "07 | Obedience"
author: "C.O."
date: "July 2026"
draft: true
---

Obedience is a word that brings to mind several emotions. Some of the emotions may be positive, and some may be negative. No matter what emotions come into play, we know from the word of GOD that obedience is an important part of our walk with the LORD. In order to do the will of GOD, we must be obedient to your voice.

Meditate on these verses to gain wisdom:

-   Week 1
    -   Psalms 111:10
-   Week 2
    -   Psalms 119:16-17
-   Week 3
    -   Samuel 7:3
-   Week 4
    -   Philippians 2:8
